title: The Nyaban Brothers Enter the Battle
description: On pages 8–11, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: You take care of Kaya Ojousama...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: make her write her will, and then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And also... those three puny ants...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Damn!! He's even more power- full than before!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
